summary.lv: Capital AS — pilna servisa IT uzņēmums, kas tirgo Dell, Apple, Lenovo, Microsoft un MikroTik tehniku — meklē Mārketinga projektu vadītāju, kas vadīs mājaslapas saturu, sociālos tīklus, e-pasta kampaņas un klientu pasākumus Rīgas birojā.
summary.en: Capital AS, a full-service IT company reselling Dell, Apple, Lenovo, Microsoft and MikroTik gear, is hiring a Marketing Project Manager based in its Riga office to run the website content, social channels, email campaigns and client events.
